title: Savory Crisp Portuguese Chips Cumble
description: A low-calorie-friendly, salty and crumbly dish featuring a caramel sauce with bhuna seasoning in one pot, perfect for a quick breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: Bhuna Seasoning Mix (t酥, cumin powder, turmeric)
Salt to taste
ingredients.notes: Adjust amount based on preference and sodium intake

instructions: Mix bhuna seasoning, salt, and ghee in a small bowl until well combined. Set aside.
Arrange potato chips on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Drizzle caramel sauce over chips.
Sprinkle the mixed bhuna seasoning mix evenly over the coated chips.
Bake for 10 minutes at 180°C, then reduce heat to 160°C and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes or until chips are golden brown and crisp.
Serve warm as a snack or breakfast accompaniment.
